⚙️ User Management

Add, edit and manage staff access.

📖 How to Use

Simple guide for all team members.

🔑 Signing In

1
Open VBS.html — double-click the file on your computer.
2
Type your Username exactly as given to you by your Administrator.
3
Type your 4-digit PIN — you will see dots, not numbers.
4
Click Sign In → — you will go straight to your personal dashboard.
⚠️ If you forget your PIN, ask your Administrator to reset it. They can change it in User Management.

📄 Generating a Quotation

1
Click the system name in the left menu — e.g. VG Outdoor, ALB Interiors.
2
Use the Calculator tab — select product, enter dimensions, choose options.
3
Click + Add to Quote. Repeat for each product the client needs.
4
Go to the Quotation tab — fill in client Name, Address, Email, Phone.
5
Tick Include Freight if needed, then click ↺ Refresh Preview.
6
Click 🖨 Print / Save PDF — choose Save as PDF in the print dialog.

👥 User Roles

Administrator — Full access to everything including financials, staff data and settings.
Finance Manager — View all financial data, reports and invoices. Cannot manage users.
Sales Executive — Generate quotes and invoices. Cannot see factory costs or margins.
Operations Manager — Manage projects and suppliers. No salary or financial data.
Technician — View assigned jobs only. Very limited access.

⚙️ Managing Users (Admin only)

1
Click Settings → Users in the left menu.
2
Click + Add User — enter their name, username, role and PIN.
3
To change a PIN — click Edit on the user card, update PIN, save.
4
To remove a user — click Delete on their card. They can no longer sign in.
💡 Tip: Give each staff member a username based on their first name — e.g. ahmed, fatuma, john. Keep it simple and lowercase.

💡 Important Rules for the Team

✓
Never share your PIN with colleagues. Each person uses their own login.
✓
Sign out when leaving your desk — click Sign Out in the top right corner.
✓
Update tracker status after every action — Sent, Approved, Invoiced, Paid.
✓
Never clear browser data — this erases all tracker records and quote numbers.
✓
Back up regularly — Admin should email the VBS.html file to themselves weekly.
✓
One computer for quotes — use the same designated computer for all official quotations.
✓
Fill client details first — enter Name, Address, Email and Phone before Refresh Preview.
✓
Save as PDF — always save margins to None in the print dialog for best results.
